items.title: महाराष्ट्र महिला किसान सशक्तिकरण विधेयक 2026 से महिलाओं को मिलेगी स्वतंत्र किसान पहचान
items.summary: महाराष्ट्र महिला किसान सशक्तिकरण विधेयक 2026 से महिलाओं को मिलेगी स्वतंत्र किसान पहचान

items.title: Bihar encounter: Man killed, two police personnel injured
items.summary: “The injured policemen are undergoing treatment at Patna AIIMS, and their condition was stated to be out of danger,” an officer said

items.title: IAF aircraft AN-32 crashes while landing in Assam's Jorhat
items.summary: A court of inquiry is being constituted to ascertain the cause of the accident, the IAF says

items.title: FIFA 2026: Kerala startup designs football-inspired fonts
items.summary: Fontspell, a startup based in Kozhikode, launches fonts that capture the energy, culture and spirit of football

items.title: Chellanam, a village near Kochi, celebrates Messi with 25-foot cutout ahead of the FIFA World Cup
items.summary: Placing the cutout of Messi at Chellanam has become something of a World Cup tradition in the coastal village near Kochi

items.title: BKC Public Transport Day: Tepid response as commuters ask for efficient last mile connectivity
items.summary: The buses and autos are the only modes of transport that provide last-mile connectivity, but it becomes a hassle due to traffic congestion and the high fares of autorickshaws

items.title: MAATI helps women artists from Bihar to look beyond art
items.summary: MAATI, short for Mithila Art Artisan Transformative Initiative, works with women artisans from Madhubhani and Darbhanga in Bihar. Four women artisans showcased their works in Bengaluru, ranging from textile to wall art

items.title: Two nursing students killed in road accident
items.summary: The deceased have been identified as Atul and Gaurishankar, both nursing students pursuing their studies in Bengaluru

items.title: Monsoon 2026 LIVE: Centre suspends Cell Broadcasting Services, a mobile-based disaster warning system
items.summary: Cell Broadcast Service is being kept on hold until further instructions due to certain issues flagged by the competent authorities, reads an order by National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA)

items.title: Centre suspends Cell Broadcasting Services
items.summary: An order issued by the National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) on June 12 stated that, due to certain issues flagged by the competent authorities, the Cell Broadcast Service is being kept on hold until further instructions

items.title: Friend of deceased arrested in medical college death case in Tripura
items.summary: An official communiqué said West Tripura District Magistrate would conduct the inquiry and submit a report to the State government

items.title: HC denies bail to 3 juveniles in sexual assault case, notes blind victim identified them by voice
items.summary: The case came to light after the chairman of the Karnal Child Welfare Committee filed a complaint stating he had visited Ansal Town for work, where he saw a girl child who appeared to be pregnant

items.title: DRDO demonstrates advanced missile defence, anti-ship strike capabilities in three successful flight tests
items.summary: It further mentioned that the multi-layered BMD capability was successfully demonstrated with interceptor missiles engaging and destroying their designated targets.
